prompt: Cinematic dark tech logo reveal animation. Deep navy-black background, hex color #0e0e18. Hundreds of tiny golden luminous particles drift slowly through empty space. The particles begin accelerating toward the center of frame, converging and assembling into the word 'RealizeOS' rendered in a clean modern sans-serif typeface. The text is gold, hex color #ffcc00. Once fully formed, a warm golden light pulse radiates outward from the letters like a shockwave. Then smaller subtitle text fades in below: 'The AI Operations System You Own' in muted white. Static camera, no camera movement. Cinematic, elegant, minimal motion graphics. Absolutely no people, no cartoons, no live action. Pure particle animation on dark background. 4K quality.
style_notes: Use 'Brand Style' ingredient for color/mood reference. Timing: 0-5s particle convergence, 5-6.5s glow pulse, 6.5-8s subtitle fade. The particles should feel like data points finding their place — not random sparkles.

flow_settings.end_frame: save → use as start frame for 02b

prompt: Professional dark tech data visualization animation. Deep navy-black background, hex #0e0e18. Static camera, no camera movement. A single glowing golden circular node fades into existence on the left third of the screen with a label 'Request' in small gold sans-serif text beneath it. After a pause, three destination nodes materialize on the right third of the screen, appearing one by one from top to bottom: first a light blue glowing node labeled 'Gemini Flash', then a warm gold glowing node labeled 'Claude Sonnet', then a deep purple glowing node labeled 'Claude Opus'. Each node has a subtle pulsing glow matching its color. Finally, thin luminous connecting lines draw themselves smoothly from the Request node outward to each of the three destination nodes. Clean minimal technical diagram aesthetic. Deep navy-black background throughout. Absolutely no people, no cartoons, no live action. Pure motion graphics. 4K quality.
style_notes: Use 'Node Diagram' ingredient for style reference. Timing: Request node 0-2s, three destination nodes appear sequentially 2-6s (1.3s each), lines draw 6-8s. Save final frame as asset for clip 2b. Colors: blue #4fc3f7, gold #ffcc00, purple #7c4dff.

prompt: Professional dark tech data visualization animation, continuation of a previous scene. Deep navy-black background, hex #0e0e18. Static camera, no camera movement. A data routing diagram is already fully visible: a golden circular node labeled 'Request' on the left, connected by thin luminous lines to three nodes on the right — a light blue node labeled 'Gemini Flash' at top, a warm gold node labeled 'Claude Sonnet' in the middle, a deep purple node labeled 'Claude Opus' at the bottom. Now animated: tiny bright golden data particles begin streaming from the Request node along the connection lines. A fast thin stream of particles races along the top line to Gemini Flash — the blue node pulses brighter. Then a steady medium-speed stream flows along the middle line to Claude Sonnet — the gold node pulses brighter. Then a thick slow deliberate stream flows along the bottom line to Claude Opus — the purple node pulses brighter. All three particle streams continue flowing simultaneously, creating a living data flow visualization. Deep navy-black background throughout. Absolutely no people, no cartoons, no live action. Pure motion graphics. 4K quality.
style_notes: Use saved frame from 02a as Start Frame for seamless continuity. Timing: Gemini stream starts 0s, Sonnet stream starts 2s, Opus stream starts 4s, all three flowing together 6-8s. The visual metaphor is 'intelligent routing' — different tasks finding optimal paths. Stream thickness implies cost/capability: thin=fast/cheap, thick=slow/powerful.

flow_settings.end_frame: save → use as start frame for 03b

prompt: Professional dark tech geometric animation. Deep navy-black background, hex #0e0e18. Static camera, no camera movement. A single golden hexagonal tile with a thin gold border, hex #ffcc00, slides smoothly in from the left edge of the screen toward the center-left area. Inside the hexagon is the bold gold letter 'F'. The hexagon pauses, then smoothly scales up to double its size, revealing inside it several small golden simplified document page icons arranged neatly. After two seconds the hexagon smoothly contracts back to its original compact size, showing just the gold letter 'F'. The hexagon settles in its final position on the left side of center. Subtle golden glow around the hexagon border. Deep navy-black background throughout. Absolutely no people, no cartoons, no live action. Pure geometric motion graphics. 4K quality.
style_notes: Use 'Gold Hexagon' ingredient for hexagon style reference. Timing: slide in 0-2s, pause 2-3s, expand to reveal icons 3-5.5s, contract 5.5-7s, settle with glow 7-8s. F = Files. Save final frame as asset for 03b. Position the hexagon at roughly 25% from left, vertically centered — leaving room for 5 more hexagons to the right.

flow_settings.end_frame: save → use as start frame for 03c

prompt: Professional dark tech geometric animation, continuation of a previous scene. Deep navy-black background, hex #0e0e18. Static camera, no camera movement. Four golden hexagonal tiles with thin gold borders are already visible in a row, containing the letters 'F', 'A', 'B', 'R'. A fifth golden hexagonal tile slides in quickly and joins the row — inside is the bold gold letter 'I'. It briefly scales up to show a golden circular feedback loop icon, then contracts back. Immediately after, a sixth golden hexagonal tile slides in and joins — inside is the bold gold letter 'C'. It briefly scales up to show golden organized file cabinet icons, then contracts back. All six hexagons now form a complete horizontal row spelling F-A-B-R-I-C with matching golden glow on each. Deep navy-black background throughout. Absolutely no people, no cartoons, no live action. Pure geometric motion graphics. 4K quality.
style_notes: Use saved frame from 03d as Start Frame. I = Interfaces, C = Configs. These two are faster since the pattern is established. I enters 0-3.5s, C enters 3.5-7s, both settled by 8s. Save final frame for 03f.

prompt: Professional dark tech geometric animation, continuation of a previous scene. Deep navy-black background, hex #0e0e18. Static camera, no camera movement. Six golden hexagonal tiles with thin gold borders are arranged in a horizontal row, each containing one bold gold letter: F, A, B, R, I, C. The tiles begin to float upward and rearrange themselves, smoothly rotating and gliding into a compact honeycomb grid formation — two rows of three hexagons tightly packed together. Once the honeycomb shape is fully assembled, all six hexagon borders pulse with an intense warm golden glow simultaneously. A radiant golden light emanates outward from the honeycomb formation like a halo. The assembled FABRIC honeycomb logo holds steady and glows warmly. Deep navy-black background throughout. Absolutely no people, no cartoons, no live action. Pure geometric motion graphics. 4K quality.
style_notes: Use saved frame from 03e as Start Frame. This is the payoff — six components unifying into one system. Timing: row visible 0-1s, tiles begin rearranging 1-3s, honeycomb formed 3-5s, golden glow pulse 5-7s, hold glowing 7-8s. Should feel satisfying and precise, like puzzle pieces clicking into place.
